title: Scale-3 antigrav generator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Scale-3 antigrav generator''' was a device used to move rocks through an anti-gravity field. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] had one on the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]

[[Category:Antigrav technology]]
